Bug / Task Description: When two replicas add the SAME element under different node IDs, the observed-remove set fails to converge: after merging a peer that has the element, the local replica keeps only the peer's tags instead of the union of both replicas' tags, losing add-wins tag accounting. Disjoint elements merge fine, so the bug only shows for elements added concurrently on both sides.
Commit Subject: fix(crdt): OR-Set merge must union tag sets
